<?php /** * netscape_ca_policy_url * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * netscape_ca_policy_url * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class netscape_ca_policy_url { const MAP = ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_IA5_STRING]; }
